body:
**ACTION ALERT: **
**Top Democratic super PAC boosts MJ Hegar in Texas' U.S. Senate race with $8.6 million TV blitz** Friend, With just 17 days to go before ballots are counted, deep-pocketed liberals from all around the country are hedging their bets.
They're pulling out of states they deem to be safe, and they're re-investing their Hollywood and New York cash into close races.
Races they believe they have a good shot at winning.
Friend, we wanted you to be the first to know that a top Democratic super PAC has decided to invest almost 9 MILLION here in Texas.
They're dumped ALMOST 9 MILLION into Texas to INUNDATE voters with attack ads on Senator Cornyn over the course of a few short weeks.
They are indicating that they believe Texas is in play.
They think Texas is flippable.
Friend, to counteract this news, we've unlocked an 8X MATCH just for you. **It will only be active for a few more hours so we need to be quick.**
**[Immediate action is requested to fight back to counter their efforts to BUY Texas and STEAL the Senate.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IRZO5eaY6i31DKwgrs_ZXhF9hUWufaEwMMBpMQydRjS9ui1vVVu9h05wmKFlBRggPkRS7bgC9uB28nK9z_LLVBb0o4JDHMd42oE2I2qvXJprA-rKXSkkzjtTLILXRW1YksOlbb2VOsc6bWPkNLIuBhI5AydzV9IkxroQnUR5dAWvBqoRxlubGlQboqEPWy9kG53KrnEUA43sntiqJL9pf8_FBBBDkbHeBVTqmndknqWs1Ap6za06ekNSbbUcOcJoVvUR3G_8rVYJYYS99BRA3EdKD0tEOGY8BcYG5pfZn7GSRhQswZv6Knbnq_lomJ5ekJ0hVISfhgd9r_hGMv5ohJ5dO7WmPmEpUJdtpaubsbcqBw8asgMWAA==&c=ogGGMVyNIqarSZk0x4SQepS93esau4v-jZPWiAvxid6bcoDapAjTnQ==&ch=MwPFD7bLtGoqTRQwpboBl_lXYcb4oKUfJhqcKZgs8uZrLGAp6RLh6g==)** _**KEEP TEXAS RED**_ Daily Goal: $300,000 8X Match: **ACTIVATED** [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IRZO5eaY6i31DKwgrs_ZXhF9hUWufaEwMMBpMQydRjS9ui1vVVu9h05wmKFlBRggPkRS7bgC9uB28nK9z_LLVBb0o4JDHMd42oE2I2qvXJprA-rKXSkkzjtTLILXRW1YksOlbb2VOsc6bWPkNLIuBhI5AydzV9IkxroQnUR5dAWvBqoRxlubGlQboqEPWy9kG53KrnEUA43sntiqJL9pf8_FBBBDkbHeBVTqmndknqWs1Ap6za06ekNSbbUcOcJoVvUR3G_8rVYJYYS99BRA3EdKD0tEOGY8BcYG5pfZn7GSRhQswZv6Knbnq_lomJ5ekJ0hVISfhgd9r_hGMv5ohJ5dO7WmPmEpUJdtpaubsbfJ1DvU62E--w==&c=ogGGMVyNIqarSZk0x4SQepS93esau4v-jZPWiAvxid6bcoDapAjTnQ==&ch=MwPFD7bLtGoqTRQwpboBl_lXYcb4oKUfJhqcKZgs8uZrLGAp6RLh6g==) If we're going to keep pace with this huge buy, we need to raise $300,000 TODAY to get up on the air with counter attacks.
We can't do it alone, though. Texas needs you, Friend. And if you've been waiting for the right time to donate it's NOW.
**[Unlock your 8X MATCH immediately. Help save Texas.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IRZO5eaY6i31DKwgrs_ZXhF9hUWufaEwMMBpMQydRjS9ui1vVVu9h05wmKFlBRggPkRS7bgC9uB28nK9z_LLVBb0o4JDHMd42oE2I2qvXJprA-rKXSkkzjtTLILXRW1YksOlbb2VOsc6bWPkNLIuBhI5AydzV9IkxroQnUR5dAWvBqoRxlubGlQboqEPWy9kG53KrnEUA43sntiqJL9pf8_FBBBDkbHeBVTqmndknqWs1Ap6za06ekNSbbUcOcJoVvUR3G_8rVYJYYS99BRA3EdKD0tEOGY8BcYG5pfZn7GSRhQswZv6Knbnq_lomJ5ekJ0hVISfhgd9r_hGMv5ohJ5dO7WmPmEpUJdtpaubsbcUHELEB72Q5w==&c=ogGGMVyNIqarSZk0x4SQepS93esau4v-jZPWiAvxid6bcoDapAjTnQ==&ch=MwPFD7bLtGoqTRQwpboBl_lXYcb4oKUfJhqcKZgs8uZrLGAp6RLh6g==)**

-Cornyn Fundraising Team Paid for by the Cornyn Majority Texas, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc., Alamo PAC, and the Republican Party of Texas. Cornyn Majority Texas
228 South Washington Street, Suite 115, Alexandria, VA 22314 CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS DISCLAIMER

The CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS (JFC) is a joint fundraising committee composed of: Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc., Alamo PAC, Republican Party of Texas, and NRSC (each individually, a Committee and collectively, the Committees). Contributions or gifts to JFC, or any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

All contributions permissible under FECA, but which would cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit to a specific Committee, shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contribution that would otherwise cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit or that is otherwise impermissible under FECA shall be refunded to the contributor. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participating Committee, to the extent permissible by FECA. Any contributor may make his or her contribution directly payable to any Committee participating in JFC. Any such designated contribution that causes the contributor to exceed the contribution limit to the designated Committee shall not be reallocated by JFC absent the prior written permission of the contributor as required by law.

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without green cards), federal government contractors, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. No contributions to the NRSC Headquarters Account or the NRSC Legal Fund will be used to influence any federal election.

The maximum an individual or a federal non-multicandidate political committee may contribute to JFC is $266,300. The maximum amount a federal multi-candidate political action committee may contribute to JFC is $120,000. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.

Contributions to JFC shall be allocated as follows:

1. The first $2,800 from any single individuals contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
2. The first $5,600 from any joint individual contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $20,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $10,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $71,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a joint individual contribution up to $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
3. The first $2,800 from any federal non-multicandidate PAC shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
4. The first $5,000 from any federal multicandidate PAC contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $5,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to the Alamo PAC. The next $15,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a federal multicandidate PAC contribution up to $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.

The contributors signature shall serve as written designation of his or her contribution to the particular elections described above. With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IRZO5eaY6i31DKwgrs_ZXhF9hUWufaEwMMBpMQydRjS9ui1vVVu9h8iWKJYtTWnyjzMaek14iWPm0iFPUSYtxOj28oWuAURm19Pidad3QLnR-_XUVZaRmmGhsOVTVCo7ggqb0ZmENU_Icf-C-6O6wcIl5tWmzfnSy0J9By-FAI4=&c=ogGGMVyNIqarSZk0x4SQepS93esau4v-jZPWiAvxid6bcoDapAjTnQ==&ch=MwPFD7bLtGoqTRQwpboBl_lXYcb4oKUfJhqcKZgs8uZrLGAp6RLh6g==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IRZO5eaY6i31DKwgrs_ZXhF9hUWufaEwMMBpMQydRjS9ui1vVVu9h3l4oNWcWHCvr89P-fEAuIpzEGvuhP22C1Jc4Q_kw1REiMoptuGWRNd2MJLhheRc8CI614YKa0RdLMWd4nhADRNNFljiiymtG7akSNMj5IHZ&c=ogGGMVyNIqarSZk0x4SQepS93esau4v-jZPWiAvxid6bcoDapAjTnQ==&ch=MwPFD7bLtGoqTRQwpboBl_lXYcb4oKUfJhqcKZgs8uZrLGAp6RLh6g==) that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IRZO5eaY6i31DKwgrs_ZXhF9hUWufaEwMMBpMQydRjS9ui1vVVu9h8iWKJYtTWnyy-_dkre0PXjMmfIJ7fLkgFmPnIKnAEgtCJPWVgm90vU-WBTdQj1yL89TWiIahZRlC-bSvKXax5TzL7JUZ5AV3ZiUQp9Rax1CD61Eg_9i3trWv0OAyVg_fg==&c=ogGGMVyNIqarSZk0x4SQepS93esau4v-jZPWiAvxid6bcoDapAjTnQ==&ch=MwPFD7bLtGoqTRQwpboBl_lXYcb4oKUfJhqcKZgs8uZrLGAp6RLh6g==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IRZO5eaY6i31DKwgrs_ZXhF9hUWufaEwMMBpMQydRjS9ui1vVVu9hzbl1khHV7JAHpbn1Fg478rv0DkWm3iHeC0d7jJsi83AxCBvGw050G4sT08ANs0XNttyJw_v51lfoQ7Zxz75SsIfiCkN61sU1nBMLsx1Mg9Xi65hOsTSt31Hs-Wj-qUTnQB_WXt2HhwSriPV6QiLztbqr1OAGvgtIKlTBUOcqMG2Ged0wc3gg9JbAwoWv2NHfALXtaKTmNn22P-vTwF72C0njeuct5ObKQC8cvRflgu9u-llRgaWy2bsXQ1iqFiEEg==&c=ogGGMVyNIqarSZk0x4SQepS93esau4v-jZPWiAvxid6bcoDapAjTnQ==&ch=MwPFD7bLtGoqTRQwpboBl_lXYcb4oKUfJhqcKZgs8uZrLGAp6RLh6g==) and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. Contributions to Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc. are not tax-deductible.

subject: I'm sorry to tell you this, Friend

Friend,
---
We _crushed_ Mark Warner in our third and final debate this week, and we're continuing to prove that he's nothing but a career swamp politician.
---
This is a pivotal moment for our campaign with only a few weeks to go until Election Day, and I cannot stress enough how much of a difference your support has made.
---
At the beginning of the summer, Warner had a 22-point lead in the polls... but now we've closed the gap to _single digits_ and are _closer than ever_ to taking back this Senate seat because of YOU.

We have less than three weeks to take this race to the finish line and BEAT Warner, and I want you by my side as we surge ahead to victory in this final battle.

name: Alerts via Senate GOP
subject: Wait, what?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
body:
When discussing policy issues Tuesday night in their debate, Cory Gardner's opponent John Hickenlooper responded to one of the policy questions with "who could say in the future."
Friend, when discussing policy issues Tuesday night in their debate, Cory Gardner's opponent John Hickenlooper responded to one of the policy questions with **" who could say in the future."**

Who could say in the future, Mr. Hickenlooper?****

With a past of ethics violations, selling positions in his office to corporations while serving as Governor, and misusing taxpayer's money to cover up his tracks, what will corporations and fellow Senators need to do to persuade him one way or another on policy if elected, Friend?

Despite this, though, the Democrat Party and the far-Left special interest groups have put aside these actions and are pouring millions of dollars into Colorado to defeat Cory. We aren't joking, Friend. We need your help right now to fight back. Can you help Cory out?

body:
I'm surprised she hasn't asked for an apology...

My opponent, Elissa Slotkin has **remained completely silent on this issue though**. For someone who claims to be '**bipartisan** ' and who '**puts people over politics** ' it seems like she is on her puppet master's side.

Let me remind you, Slotkin voted in **FAVOR** of Pelosi's recent socialist grab bag agenda that would have given money to illegal immigrants, released prisoners and the list goes on. _**Slotkin KNEW these policies were dead on arrival in the Senate -- her TRUE colors are really showing**_. **[DONATE TO STOP NANCY PELOSI FROM TAKING AMERICANS HOSTAGE]** Friend, I know you are tired of all these partisan games Pelosi is playing right now. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
We are the only organization solely focused on electing Republicans to down-ballot, state-level offices. We accomplish this by working directly with Republican leadership in the states and providing them with resources, training, and funding. We have nearly 200,000 donors in all 50 states. The RSLC invested a record $45 million into state-level races in the 2017-2018 election cycle, which contributed to state-level Republicans maintaining 61 of 99 legislative chamber majorities, holding 25 lieutenant governor seats, and 29 secretaries of state offices. Your support is critical to making this happen. You can learn more about us at RSLC.GOP.

name: Todd Young
subject: Let me be frank
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TODD YOUNG, INC
body:
Let me be clear.
Let me be clear, Friend, our Senate Majority is in real danger this year.

With Democrats raising record sums of money to unseat Republicans, our Senate Majority is up for grabs like never before. If we don't act soon, Chuck Schumer will become the Majority Leader, _**giving him the power to pack the courts come January. **_

We can't let this happen, Friend, our Constitutional Freedoms and Liberties are riding on these last critical moments until the election. Can you stand up and help today?

[**DEFEND THE SENATE MAJORITY - DONATE**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001L-m2SCMuq3spBwrQbXRLZMfBcqQ-pmsD3bvdw5qatl686bl9mKBG7Uc3vieaA2-6ECR0hov25_mdcAPJX6a9gDDHn85m2XK373qJbyI5_dArYd3ZoISMdsDiQV404XPxMvuS8KY6tPySqHb-0kLwtUMvL0BfQqdWC32XFvCoQOk6OXHewo43scdMKWlm4_ti4nOAG4CX9NhQEJIJ3diJZoo9D46USD9R1fFdVIsNbHnfaRTzbiGGVDAJunXSWr88kQ78dpLgIkNJD5oQrv2npf-3qUDPdzSAIgokU1nTvlx6QAf1e6xenPNBW4QCjZUVSgi9UGNMm4khciOA1xNlfRigMKOsehjqiD1Z0vKrqGy5sbhqyjet8i_TXi33_aE9PidIYdaEvtDML3IXKoSyguwAZld1etNJ3LNQ1gQ6XWY2nRAoyGg0gk5tZbCffG20&c=LsidFk-gK4O2HLnsjP2Xv4Z1IL3Z_sx4gNL_DmCMCx69Cm_IBaLUpA==&ch=ooyEiQb5LLEYp8NGKOHagloBnN5egPrcmGMc3wzgFOCnD9tChIIMwQ==)

name: Carlos Gimenez
subject: Here are the facts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carlos Gimenez for Congress
body:
We have a record to be proud of, %%First Name%%, and now it's time to bring this record of results to Congress.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001noglFEc97ijsY9rgWTmuFh1-HFGQfSpPrKYMEp4mqu9n0fLMKxLNYOCXKMM2ZReGYspS2D_KVvqQOgO1nBOOGnXg8aNsQppJtrFqeQxqxOwNEWmnWu-Xl2xHUFfRf20w82DiOl9IhOkcwW-rAIyMGQV-CU9fWpDtvFUyT17pdqwPtaDgEt4b3Asnxv95BQJuzhOkNuSYBFSRvdBii6c1RAtaDtbBmE3Q5CR-ItWCyU0W0by-xJYo610Zq6vo21HALtqivhd2s0PfErTa8e3iHbhF0VP1MlfGxBo8y8kNN0ULcKWDevGReECkX_WMIIrbbyNSp3doAWCgY8ZnnXTkHFfxWuPW13B-Keqdq8GaH7imMmA9MPj4sHaXKX01yvwNgpg_Yk4s4Ot1Nm2YikDnSs6lBFkPzRD1FSsYAet9dl4=&c=Bc5LI0ngmlxObxxrNy1la2znHAi04csdi50piqD-7yOcw2JE0EV-pw==&ch=Y6WiPx_eBQHjMzOBtzmLVpjPevKnurm22K7IGwe2cZ0KF-b8cKBvaw==) **Here are the facts:**
* **The general election is in just 16 DAYS**
* Our liberal opponent is lining up every dollar she can against us
* It's up to us to take her on.

As Mayor of Miami-Dade County, I took on special interests and raging partisanship to fight for those who mattered: hardworking South Floridians who feel their government is failing to work for **THEM**.

**And I 'm proud of what we accomplished:**
* I balanced a budget of $8.9 billion **8 YEARS in a ROW.**
* Cut taxes by **$1,700 PER HOUSEHOLD.**
* Fought for **transparency and accountability.**
* Saved the taxpayers **$400,000,000.00+** in wasteful spending.
* Dropped unemployment from **10% to BELOW 2%.**
* **Led one of the STRONGEST economic comebacks in American history.**

And the results are clear: Miami-Dade County is more prosperous, ready to take on the challenges of the 21st Century, and **ready to lead the nation in opportunity and growth.**
[HELP GET CARLOS TO CONGRESS](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001noglFEc97ijsY9rgWTmuFh1-HFGQfSpPrKYMEp4mqu9n0fLMKxLNYOCXKMM2ZReGYspS2D_KVvqQOgO1nBOOGnXg8aNsQppJtrFqeQxqxOwNEWmnWu-Xl2xHUFfRf20w82DiOl9IhOkcwW-rAIyMGQV-CU9fWpDtvFUyT17pdqwPtaDgEt4b3Asnxv95BQJuzhOkNuSYBFSRvdBii6c1RAtaDtbBmE3Q5CR-ItWCyU0W0by-xJYo610Zq6vo21HALtqivhd2s0PfErTa8e3iHbhF0VP1MlfGxBo8y8kNN0ULcKWDevGReECkX_WMIIrbbyNSp3doAWCgY8ZnnXTkHFfxWuPW13B-Keqdq8GaH7imMmA9MPj4sHaXKX01yvwNgpg_Yk4s4Ot1Nm2YikDnSs6lBFkPzRD1FSsYAet9dl4=&c=Bc5LI0ngmlxObxxrNy1la2znHAi04csdi50piqD-7yOcw2JE0EV-pw==&ch=Y6WiPx_eBQHjMzOBtzmLVpjPevKnurm22K7IGwe2cZ0KF-b8cKBvaw==) Now, I'm building on that record of **BIPARTISAN** success by running for Congress. Fighting for Florida has been my SOLE PRIORITY for the last nine years. This has never been about scoring political points -- it has been about serving the country that gave my family **EVERYTHING**. **** [HELP GET CARLOS TO CONGRESS](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001noglFEc97ijsY9rgWTmuFh1-HFGQfSpPrKYMEp4mqu9n0fLMKxLNYOCXKMM2ZReGYspS2D_KVvqQOgO1nBOOGnXg8aNsQppJtrFqeQxqxOwNEWmnWu-Xl2xHUFfRf20w82DiOl9IhOkcwW-rAIyMGQV-CU9fWpDtvFUyT17pdqwPtaDgEt4b3Asnxv95BQJuzhOkNuSYBFSRvdBii6c1RAtaDtbBmE3Q5CR-ItWCyU0W0by-xJYo610Zq6vo21HALtqivhd2s0PfErTa8e3iHbhF0VP1MlfGxBo8y8kNN0ULcKWDevGReECkX_WMIIrbbyNSp3doAWCgY8ZnnXTkHFfxWuPW13B-Keqdq8GaH7imMmA9MPj4sHaXKX01yvwNgpg_Yk4s4Ot1Nm2YikDnSs6lBFkPzRD1FSsYAet9dl4=&c=Bc5LI0ngmlxObxxrNy1la2znHAi04csdi50piqD-7yOcw2JE0EV-pw==&ch=Y6WiPx_eBQHjMzOBtzmLVpjPevKnurm22K7IGwe2cZ0KF-b8cKBvaw==) I've been privileged to serve my community for the last thirty years. To have been able to give**BACK SO MUCH** to the country that I love has been the honor of a lifetime. [HELP GET CARLOS TO CONGRESS](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001noglFEc97ijsY9rgWTmuFh1-HFGQfSpPrKYMEp4mqu9n0fLMKxLNYOCXKMM2ZReGYspS2D_KVvqQOgO1nBOOGnXg8aNsQppJtrFqeQxqxOwNEWmnWu-Xl2xHUFfRf20w82DiOl9IhOkcwW-rAIyMGQV-CU9fWpDtvFUyT17pdqwPtaDgEt4b3Asnxv95BQJuzhOkNuSYBFSRvdBii6c1RAtaDtbBmE3Q5CR-ItWCyU0W0by-xJYo610Zq6vo21HALtqivhd2s0PfErTa8e3iHbhF0VP1MlfGxBo8y8kNN0ULcKWDevGReECkX_WMIIrbbyNSp3doAWCgY8ZnnXTkHFfxWuPW13B-Keqdq8GaH7imMmA9MPj4sHaXKX01yvwNgpg_Yk4s4Ot1Nm2YikDnSs6lBFkPzRD1FSsYAet9dl4=&c=Bc5LI0ngmlxObxxrNy1la2znHAi04csdi50piqD-7yOcw2JE0EV-pw==&ch=Y6WiPx_eBQHjMzOBtzmLVpjPevKnurm22K7IGwe2cZ0KF-b8cKBvaw==)
As a child, I escaped Cuba with my family in search of a better life -- and we found that here in South Florida. **I raised a family, children and grandchildren, and worked hard to achieve the American Dream. **

But that dream is fading away for many Americans who don't think they'll see the prosperity and opportunity their parents did -- and that's why I'm running for Congress.
[HELP GET CARLOS TO CONGRESS](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001noglFEc97ijsY9rgWTmuFh1-HFGQfSpPrKYMEp4mqu9n0fLMKxLNYOCXKMM2ZReGYspS2D_KVvqQOgO1nBOOGnXg8aNsQppJtrFqeQxqxOwNEWmnWu-Xl2xHUFfRf20w82DiOl9IhOkcwW-rAIyMGQV-CU9fWpDtvFUyT17pdqwPtaDgEt4b3Asnxv95BQJuzhOkNuSYBFSRvdBii6c1RAtaDtbBmE3Q5CR-ItWCyU0W0by-xJYo610Zq6vo21HALtqivhd2s0PfErTa8e3iHbhF0VP1MlfGxBo8y8kNN0ULcKWDevGReECkX_WMIIrbbyNSp3doAWCgY8ZnnXTkHFfxWuPW13B-Keqdq8GaH7imMmA9MPj4sHaXKX01yvwNgpg_Yk4s4Ot1Nm2YikDnSs6lBFkPzRD1FSsYAet9dl4=&c=Bc5LI0ngmlxObxxrNy1la2znHAi04csdi50piqD-7yOcw2JE0EV-pw==&ch=Y6WiPx_eBQHjMzOBtzmLVpjPevKnurm22K7IGwe2cZ0KF-b8cKBvaw==)
I'm going to Washington to **WORK** for _t_ _hose who need it most, those who 've been ignored by career politicians with no interests other than their own._ [**But this fight won 't be easy -- our FAR LEFT OPPONENT has MILLIONS MORE than we do. Can we count on you to help us level the playing field? **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001noglFEc97ijsY9rgWTmuFh1-HFGQfSpPrKYMEp4mqu9n0fLMKxLNYOCXKMM2ZReGYspS2D_KVvqQOgO1nBOOGnXg8aNsQppJtrFqeQxqxOwNEWmnWu-Xl2xHUFfRf20w82DiOl9IhOkcwW-rAIyMGQV-CU9fWpDtvFUyT17pdqwPtaDgEt4b3Asnxv95BQJuzhOkNuSYBFSRvdBii6c1RAtaDtbBmE3Q5CR-ItWCyU0W0by-xJYo610Zq6vo21HALtqivhd2s0PfErTa8e3iHbhF0VP1MlfGxBo8y8kNN0ULcKWDevGReECkX_WMIIrbbyNSp3doAWCgY8ZnnXTkHFfxWuPW13B-Keqdq8GaH7imMmA9MPj4sHaXKX01yvwNgpg_Yk4s4Ot1Nm2YikDnSs6lBFkPzRD1FSsYAet9dl4=&c=Bc5LI0ngmlxObxxrNy1la2znHAi04csdi50piqD-7yOcw2JE0EV-pw==&ch=Y6WiPx_eBQHjMzOBtzmLVpjPevKnurm22K7IGwe2cZ0KF-b8cKBvaw==)

Thanks for all of your help,

Mayor Carlos Gimenez

name: Michelle Steel
subject: Whose side are you on, Friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
I am a mother, immigrant, woman, and proud conservative. I decided to fight back. And I haven't stopped fighting for what I believe in since.

.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DzVVeMXKjEhzuDs0R0yLqkolz1m0OGFL2Ys-iyQkHoUuM_wPE3q9SbfiIR5W0mOCnWiVgj-bwYg7AgJSxpIdTjRfap8w-r7OW4WYwc3-CR2LvxF8Y_eG2VkBUmyRGcSWCKrJD82A_2sgOlGitv1VMmC0ZI66Q6vweXClB6W9M_B3sw2oKkZBC7sRbBSj-NYkWa38O9dS1bFvjVcDYzw7udpN660gS5D_fAORYn7KJFIk_b5UA4tSsykq7j1P6NMgH7SeuukAhNFul3lh3E7QIsdM0HInyLWHkLOYLRrvhaTf9BBPWsr-QLXVBFyr1SXBBVLKGYUcOI17iVrnIsJ0neig5OSz6srCkSb0I0AnXPtqDg77qSzN_hi4Nq_TTl5bSMOaiQQ2_qDIUuOfYL4JUvT06wmiG7LnhKW3lA16FHhFJgJgDtl5NA==&c=KJtHl83czOQiGHUrQoq793E6r9qPDPRHSj0UEfhr1jdFQ0pnEpY_tg==&ch=b1HaybcUogwJOfAJduP1P7WNiGA87dEFGp26iy0pfmPfqz5OiT1q8A==)
I am a mother, immigrant, woman, and proud conservative.

When I came to this country, I came searching for opportunity. Instead, I found a broken political system taking advantage of the people it was built to serve. I watched my own mom -- a single mother and small business owner -- fall victim to an undue tax bill just because she lacked the resources to fight back.

So, I decided to fight back. _And I haven 't stopped fighting for what I believe in since. _

I led the charge to return over $400 million to California taxpayers. I promised to fight against any and all tax increases and pledged to fight against all new taxes.

**With just 17 days to go, POLITICO is still calling this race a TOSS-UP and Inside Elections says it 's the seat most likely to flip from blue to red in all of Orange County. clean_body: I am a mother, immigrant, woman, and proud conservative. I decided to fight back. And I haven't stopped fighting for what I believe in since. . == I am a mother, immigrant, woman, and proud conservative. When I came to this country, I came searching for opportunity. Instead, I found a broken political system taking advantage of the people it was built to serve. I watched my own mom -- a single mother and small business owner -- fall victim to an undue tax bill just because she lacked the resources to fight back. So, I decided to fight back. And I haven 't stopped fighting for what I believe in since. I led the charge to return over $400 million to California taxpayers. I promised to fight against any and all tax increases and pledged to fight against all new taxes. On the other hand, Jason Lewis has been traveling across the state, meeting with people from all walks of life, and learning about how Tina Smith and the rest of the radical left's mob-rule has harmed their livelihood.

Jason is the #1 Pro-Trump fighter and has proven that he's not afraid to call out the failed Democratic leadership for their inaction around the destructive riots that plagued Minneapolis, or for their one-size fits all lockdown policies that did more harm than good. He's been a leader in the fight to reopen the country and to help President Trump put **America First**.

It's a message even Democrats can get behind, like the Democrat Mayors on the Iron Range who just recently endorsed President Trump and Jason Lewis for saving their livelihoods by reopening the Iron Range after Obama-Biden closed it down.

And it's a message that resonates with Independents as well, as his campaign for U.S. Senate leads in support among Independents by 5 POINTS, according to the latest polling.

The groundswell of support for President Trump and Jason Lewis each passing day is only growing stronger Friend. As the momentum continues to grow we cannot let up on the gas.

body:
The Q3 fundraising numbers are in, and we just can’t believe it... | |
---
I have some really exciting news to share with you, friend.

_**We outraised Chris Pappas.**_

Even though this is a HUGE win for our campaign, we can’t afford to take our foot off the gas just yet. **We may have outraised him last filing, but this email is proof that Pappas isn’t wasting any time trying to make up lost ground...and he’s closing in fast.**

We need to keep the momentum going so Chris Pappas doesn’t take back the lead before Election Day.

**Friend, if you’re able, please chip in $5 or whatever you can to help us keep up the momentum:[https://secure.winred.com/mowers-for-congress/direct-1625144/](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=a1db5b02b8c341e5be9167269993cba1&_e=7z_dehIkku0W3nntOGYJ7hWvxr-j3Jp9679nzrCobKe6cm-sFit2YLvMdVCdL8MQM-VKh38WO7o71HkLHZ65QFTHO-qzTM15v6ZtnQyzjzo9WqRXytp8ptfL_lSKdtiwxsG8yI9RF5zFbaMgrhcyZIlfK22hdVJGIcCTaTud259vzg0KlU4F7bpj3sX1AtQVGUYI7t_X0mxMztahqg2O6iNGw6d8JF2o-tFbEGoH4iXPjgaWTgkA1usv-44ybEzK_-vEt7-wqF6yQVQW5viRsF53b-o-0_pgF93npJeRQ8uOIRgu7D1SWA_XyCLET8ivwGZxgfiF_VePTaflsjXpG9a-5TWBOgsTUk8KUhWzT3ruipLkI7O1YNi8XCzyz2D96I2JRNfudTgr5gMbSAehda7XFLnGFmcCAeSzEaEutVCfomKGu0e03EjzetCgC6crEGGl-gAUxuiMEAbMM_OkAzqgQIACt3aYIzzTVwJCFn3WaTWC_Hg1Jx-IVLDrWVDk)**

Thanks again for all you do to support our campaign. I can’t wait to get to Washington so I can fight for YOU, friend.

\- Matt

\--------- Forwarded Message ---------
**From:** Team Pappas
**Date:** October 14, 2020 at 7:21 PM
**To:** mmowers@teammowers.com
**Subject:** We were outraised

Team — this was not the headline we wanted to see this week:
|
---
**"Mowers reports raising $668K in third quarter, most ever**

_\-- WMUR9, 10/13/20_

Our opponent outraised us in the last reporting period and set a new record for Republican fundraising in our district.

National Republicans are consolidating their support behind Matt Mowers because they know Chris's seat is key to taking back the House majority. It's clear they're prepared to spend whatever it takes to win, and we have to fight back.

_**We can't afford to be outraised again, team. Will you rush an urgent donation before our final FEC deadline tonight at midnight to ensure we can make up this fundraising deficit before it's too late?**_

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**$10**

Thanks for being a part of the team,
Team Pappas

name: Joe Sanberg
subject: Now is the time for George Gascón
body:
A crucial race is happening in Los Angeles this November. And wherever you live- this race will be critical to our movement. It’s a race that will determine whether one of the most progressive cities in the nation continues to criminalize poverty, perpetuate institutionalized racism, and pursue a failed war on drugs that has devastated communities of color.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/20437066/256985408/-2147125543?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMy8xLzc0NDg5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3ZmE4NDI5LWE0MTAtZWIxMS05NmY1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYWZmYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=10FJ9aocCCz6pJ4m-uC2sJaaVS01O7r4WL21yYIxJDo=&emci=6cecc062-1110-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=37fa8429-a410-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=7114755)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/20437067/256985409/-927849478?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMy8xLzc0NDg5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3ZmE4NDI5LWE0MTAtZWIxMS05NmY1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYWZmYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=10FJ9aocCCz6pJ4m-uC2sJaaVS01O7r4WL21yYIxJDo=&emci=6cecc062-1110-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=37fa8429-a410-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=7114755) **A crucial race is happening in Los Angeles this November.** And wherever you live—this race will be critical to our movement. It’s a race that will determine whether one of the most progressive cities in the nation continues to criminalize poverty, perpetuate institutionalized racism, and pursue a failed war on drugs that has devastated communities of color. **The race for LA District Attorney will impact us for years to come. ** Now is the moment to choose a leader who will redefine our criminal justice system to reflect our community's values. **Now is the time for George Gascón!** George has rejected contributions from the Los Angeles Police Protective League—Jackie Lacey’s campaign is almost entirely funded by policing groups. **George reduced the disparity between sentencing between white and black defendants by 50%** —under Jackie Lacey, whites in L.A. County were incarcerated in state prisons at a rate of 1.6 per 1,000 people, while for Blacks it was 20.8 per 1,000 people. **George doesn't believe in the death penalty** —Jackie Lacey continues to send Californians to death row. If LA fundamentally transforms our racist criminal justice system, it could have a ripple effect across the nation. _**That's why Working Hero is proud to endorse George Gascón for Los Angeles District Attorney. **_ The election is just around the corner. Let’s help George cross the finish line and secure a victory for all Angelenos. [Join Working Hero Founder Joe Sanberg, Representatives Ro Khanna and Nanette Barragàn, legendary political movement leader Nina Turner, and special surprise guests for a virtual GOTV rally for George Gascón this Monday, October 19th at 5pmPT!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/20437068/256985410/-927849478?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMy8xLzc0NDg5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3ZmE4NDI5LWE0MTAtZWIxMS05NmY1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYWZmYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=10FJ9aocCCz6pJ4m-uC2sJaaVS01O7r4WL21yYIxJDo=&emci=6cecc062-1110-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=37fa8429-a410-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=7114755) In solidarity, Joe
---
* * *

Working Hero PAC
10877 Wilshire Blvd
Los Angeles, CA 90024
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/6cecc062-1110-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc/37fa8429-a410-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMy8xLzc0NDg5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3ZmE4NDI5LWE0MTAtZWIxMS05NmY1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYWZmYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=10FJ9aocCCz6pJ4m-uC2sJaaVS01O7r4WL21yYIxJDo=&id=108623647).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: 39% of our October goal
body:
My campaign manager just called and she told me that we are 39% of the way towards hitting our goal for October. That isn’t quite where we want to be. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/845a95a5b4cb/39-of-our-october-goal?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
My campaign manager just called and she told me that we are 39% of the way towards hitting our goal for October. That isn’t quite where we want to be.

I am in this race fighting to flip the Illinois 16th from red to blue, and to unseat the last remaining Republican member of Congress in Northern Illinois. He has made a career of making things harder for working families like mine. He has consistently voted **against** LGBTQ rights, women’s rights, the environment, and folks with preexisting conditions. Instead of standing up for his constituents, he stands with his corporate donors.

I am running on a platform focused on universal healthcare access, equitable COVID-19 relief, tackling the climate crisis, and getting a real infrastructure bill passed so that we can fix our crumbling roads and bridges.

My opponent is backed by corporate PACs and special interest groups, so he doesn’t have to worry about having enough money.******I have refused that dirty money.** That means I rely on small dollar donors like you to pitch in so we don’t fall short.

[Can I count on you to chip in and help us pick our pace back up?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=44e5dc04dd&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

name: My Faith Votes
subject: Reminder: Virtual Seminar Tomorrow, Life and Death on the Ballot
body:
| | RSVP for this Pro-Life Event
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iaoKtzDUYfBhKGwS9Qv7TsMep_R798fq2PTSdAUnxcxJROYI6Oh3EBNwOfie_uKT6w&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201017com01&n=1)
| Peter, Tomorrow night,**Sunday, October 18, at 5:00 PM PT / 8:00 PM ET** , is our virtual pro-life seminar _“How Then Shall We Vote.”_ You will not want to miss this informative evening. Together, My Faith Votes is joining with the Colson Center for Christian Worldview and the Life Training Institute to discuss protecting the unborn through voting this November. This virtual event is the perfect opportunity to invite any of your pro-life friends who are not political or perhaps are undecided on if or how they will vote. With just a few weeks until election day, now is the time to make sure Christians are prepared to vote for biblical values - and the right to life is at the top of that list. [RSVP and plan to watch this virtual event on Sunday.](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iaoKtzDUYfBhKGwS9Qv7TsMep_R798fq2PTSdAUnxcxJ9Je5bweRpI1aP7eqz9yYLjWEyJSamQE2modgauVY6ztMU1EKxPEdprqWVhmC6DRRHoYryvmR-fB0weUK2_SLYg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201017com01&n=2) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iaoKtzDUYfBhKGwS9Qv7TsMep_R798fq2PTSdAUnxcxJ9Je5bweRpI1aP7eqz9yYLjWEyJSamQE2modgauVY6ztMU1EKxPEdprqWVhmC6DRRHoYryvmR-fB0weUK2_SLYg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201017com01&n=3) If we hope to protect the unborn, we must understand the pro-life issues at stake, vote, and then do all we can to reach others to do the same. Thank you for standing with us to protect life in America. **Pray. Think. Vote.** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201017com01&n=4)
---

Peter,

**Election Day is just 17 days from now - it's practically here. Voting is underway in Ohio and many places around the country**.

In the time that we have remaining, we have a lot of work to do and important goals to meet if we're going to take the House from Nancy Pelosi , re-elect President Donald Trump, and keep my home state of Ohio - a key swing state where polls showing a tightening race - RED.

**Yesterday,** my team sent you an email laying out the number of donations we need to find to keep our campaign fully funded between now and Election Day. My team tells me that from here on out, **[we need to 1,129 donations PER DAY**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56607905:WX54OVKtN:m:1:2247059263:5A3EC4A2257C5B7358B7301EF15F3730:r).

**Our goal this weekend is to put a big dent in that number, so we have doubled the number of daily donations needed to 2,258 for today and tomorrow.**

**[Can we count on you to be one of the donors we need today in order to not fall behind this early in October?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56607905:WX54OVKtN:m:1:2247059263:5A3EC4A2257C5B7358B7301EF15F3730:r)**

**CHIP-IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT ** **[$15➔](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56607906:WX54OVKtN:m:1:2247059263:5A3EC4A2257C5B7358B7301EF15F3730:r) ** | | **[$50➔](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56607907:WX54OVKtN:m:1:2247059263:5A3EC4A2257C5B7358B7301EF15F3730:r) **

We have built a movement together that will be a force to be reckoned with over the coming months and years - however, **[our first test comes in less than one month and right now we can't compete with national Democrat's cash advantage](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56607905:WX54OVKtN:m:1:2247059263:5A3EC4A2257C5B7358B7301EF15F3730:r)**.

Your continued support in our fight for liberty is critical to our success.

For liberty,

name: Team Kasich
subject: The Latest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
Election Day is two weeks from Tuesday and like many Americans, we can't wait for this one to be over with. [ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=22e75c413bd740308d97e1fca3b388ad&_e=coamAYYKww3yKT0H3DhgOMnc1K2EtRjChpkjSH8EODznoU7MH_dZc4EcVfTDL3vaAR21uqQuiIbjbLr0kRjjLQ_P_BFehmNV4fUj1IwJs4Ma_HXpmwredjxLx-fUmPn0vCqfYcp9TV62pVqSIPqQVAQqnxaOH3aGSTqOFKltDyYL2eJTTVaKTaVuTn3LUh93RlT9Xsew2u_W5Dw5KjACIPkH03GKs7qdusSettOMMv_j-Rpct_Ellx6SmaSir_52_wdE7I23cYudWVvRl-evWw%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter - Election Day is two weeks from Tuesday - and like many Americans - we can't wait for this one to be over. Now is your chance to make your voice heard and we'd encourage you to consider voting early to avoid the long lines if that's an option in your state.

Please see the brief summary below of Gov. Kasich's recent activities and learn more about how you can help right now!

-Team Kasich
|
---
**Jimmy Kimmel Live! Interview:**

Gov. Kasich spoke about the 2020 election, the dangers of sowing doubt in the integrity of the election and how each of us has a role to play in healing our nation's divisions.
[ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=22e75c413bd740308d97e1fca3b388ad&_e=coamAYYKww3yKT0H3DhgOAybIaU6GVOzf4T21-1cGnFiXSpAjl_bpq9PjAndKVyI1k2R5Yf9XBE9zZGaJEC2EqCTa7ecLrPOyinkAAEV1t2ZFMuqfEcDXRw2CY0TF1imdBksx7c53z61OHVb83rUAs0mpZGQEfIxPeoaNVW7gEHn6PlKcfAFCtMiLOSgmSLsptiTEieLKB65FB8y65be_MEV5Z-vaqFh3gIpEOfuIGS8Fx6o34kmHyCdWmKKDs4l_If4l-uaKOQDmbMZPx6RsA%3D%3D)
|
---

They are working tirelessly to build compromise and get our government working to improve the lives of people again.

The initiative we launched recently aims to raise funds to make maximum allowable contributions to the Republican members of this group who are in competitive re-election campaigns. [Can you help hit our goal?](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=22e75c413bd740308d97e1fca3b388ad&_e=coamAYYKww3yKT0H3DhgOCfnCik5U2aDecpVtgqi9CV96wwI8j5H16CF8RqIp4uuowa4aCbSEmPcNneDmlxspB4QxVqFgA18X0OdDaVon8_bdjsEReo9XxBRwO9NERxC2_yt7IIucKUGgWBOAKhJueb88L0J2Q5LidLmU5duPAjepEV3XWVjqIo6D21RfWu-eofRowU3qb2ZOfCCrgwQ-VrF4uE3GtKw-0Tm1d6n-69sk3XK4TYr8xi-XQ5MFDrEaDAQXScX9vdfosgI4PiLKfp2Nb2ISsIPp5Qb-9KBpks%3D)

subject: The deciding factor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c4e/7f51f7bc/4646794e/4efbed10/3283590678/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c4e/7f51f7bc/4646794e/4efbed17/3283590678/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201017.1nd__2313__&amount=10")
---
Peter -- will we see _your_ name next? **[Make your first donation today to get on MJ's list of top supporters! ](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c4e/7f51f7bc/4646794e/4efbed17/3283590678/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201017.1nd__2313__&amount=10")**

Even though we're only 18 days out from the election, there are still a lot of undecided voters. If we can reach them with MJ's message before Election Day, that's the ballgame.

If you were waiting to make your first donation, don't wait a moment longer!
SUPPORTER RECORD FOR Peter

Donated to help us reach undecided voters? _Not yet*_
---
**Honestly, we can't stress enough how _critical_ undecided voters will be to the outcome of this razor-thin race. **

They will be the deciding factor between sending MJ Hegar, a fierce fighter for Texans to the Senate ... or reelecting Sen. John Cornyn, who's spent 18 years in the Senate looking out for the special interest donors that keep him in Washington.

**[Help us spread MJ's message across Texas during these final 18 days. Make your first donation* today -- before it's too late!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c4e/7f51f7bc/4646794e/4efbed17/3283590678/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201017.1nd__2313__&amount=10")**

Taylor Klos
Texas Finance Director
MJ for Texas
_*If you've already contributed to the campaign, thank you so much! Our records are based on donations associated with this email address in our online database, which may take some time to update._

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c4e/7f51f7bc/4646794e/4efbed17/3283590678/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201017.1nd__2313__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c4e/7f51f7bc/4646794e/4efbed16/3283590678/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2313&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891c4e/7f51f7bc/4646794e/4efbed15/3283590678/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

we have some critical deadlines coming up that could affect whether or not your voice is heard on November 3rd | |

[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=ab915a2df191443c80d160453a40eebd&_e=ZcO_i4SFQ1XSGwjFh-wWpk_JOUHvpPAbzGBOvG8TuIrPP1DsvPeyVXXqinIx0lizOhtAGTd5O-3ZXP8Nr31Cakb6iHkoyFdWX-QHnTNdX0cJXEIklA7ExqoDtnCnzTr8oSxLU-frtaAYZwu0G4HDADvBXqhCWWPJ64mzmr7serZmhs_6pDu0Gh2QBIiTxTq6UQNSeNmza1Gf5RB44x19Gi08U2WKDCpxvBjc_xBF8hlyL5_I102wsJh6uahs48V5VwgHGAgsq_MJB4jyX_BR2SpM2L1zFF3UHKhNMwRPzOVqA2nVrMrlHnwbWQleQQ1o1K56i6weDuY6P2z-C2CNsZRU-MgT26eQyiWaxR8dUFEXZYD3qJUtnMd8scReF5dxkjzvuouFgut82LjBlMzyOVr0Z4FKMzv8wCEYVs_FpGQjkrird1xVTUu6KIw5E2O36GjZQ2D8YyIGrIs7JGJX9mI_jtosKxMeYCvh3yU7-hw%3D)

Friend,

Election Day is still 17 days away – but here in Illinois we have some critical deadlines coming up much sooner that could affect whether or not your voice is heard in this election.

**Tomorrow** is the voter registration deadline, so now’s the time to check your voter registration, ensure you’re registered, and make a voting plan.
[**Register to Vote in Illinois**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=ab915a2df191443c80d160453a40eebd&_e=ZcO_i4SFQ1XSGwjFh-wWputd_Dbky5qvdvFrrIiiaZlOBPcAkwfFfsnBKU2BeXcnIdNXNiembzJxDwhqduXUda5FhWJmeUex2e1anCU-kwlJ3gX12ZBipJyrr0sRlLokbjF91F9TKeCIZDULDvnvy_Q1BHzktARkxcDXL2VH3Id15tFjAvSkZmd3NppseRNLUYl3elH4FVwbFYG_eWcQFx5rNfM-2YdNWF8eu3G2Lh1wkvK-9CgSio30ddRq8e9BYIciHk0830f5drL-Nl9xfmqtO20jKVSb8KpE0wkQdhRu6OVCHqmXbytaKpTCjzQSnsfBjwTuDuvHmbCgDg2dMQjFSSfZ2Rc-Ug_kGg6MdeH1KYberbyyPwgOtgL5rvBAnpFEqbzSR95ORYr4aakKyIUIBk15cfwGyfAf3jYhkao5Z1yKqqOn1-sI1yANisnP0dLMUH6DH8b_sqoitRgeAg%3D%3D)
[**Submit Your Mail-in Ballot**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=ab915a2df191443c80d160453a40eebd&_e=ZcO_i4SFQ1XSGwjFh-wWpiprJSHePVi9aNaKtvDYgTyu0qkdtjpJt-eRL42DtfiQxURTB9iF8TxdqfYDJOafNKJFnUu_MmvKJPwq6zhHUcGE7PWpnV8v6wiDwKEB-_zeZLEPeyfC3g3gC3uA7Gbkslgm1b3IKzCt9BqG-xibdr04mtnFvxrWNdV19WErkl-NDLes-GdTJVL8k7VqTv4nIubqcWYUmwnh_wqNgO9FeQv2C-4CNseSuom5nGyYSukcrfk4iKutFQsiyNdX6eWKUaDLtJtd6G7DoVvEKSESYINA2Ecqq59dGPylNxgf3F_Q2_2BAmcMQ6ZRXRE40tXYVfhpy3025RdmPGLXoH-YlPnFjFBwozWAh-ZEoo6YtztL9ZX4kyVGRp_0HzbxEGK8Kwl1k18dj1Gz_ydQE3AhNh6NMfG-JplPRfVPTsldqXHZ52us9UkXbxE6i10XjyIOvMVEz5ESzmWzIia0rToVHTPn8osebmfhLwkW_AmtelstUojgZOV-rlh091yl9cv-6AKGT0z1I3Q2Q6-jAEOutrA%3D)
Keep in mind, friend – we have until November 3rd to submit mail-in ballots but election officials are encouraging Illinoisians to submit completed ballots as soon as possible as to avoid any delays in the vote count.

_This is a critical election and we need to make sure that everybody’s voice is heard in time if we’re going to defend conservative leaders like Darin on November 3rd!_

**Let’s vote, Illinois!**

Thank you,
Team LaHood

This is a critical election and we need to make sure that everybody’s voice is heard in time if we’re going to defend conservative leaders like Darin on November 3rd! Let’s vote, Illinois! Thank you, Team LaHood | | | Paid for by LaHood for Congress | | P.O. Box 10735 Peoria, IL 61612 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

Friend,

This is it — Election Day is around the corner.

There are less than three weeks to go until November 3rd, and we’re kicking our campaign into a higher gear.

**Simply put, it’s time for the full-court press. **
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=8e6c7373de7645a1b8b554b77ec4a1e2&_e=hkNSWEklo6Kr2HxA2ewwZUdp7V4K8GzjB1Q2JC5-G4xgB3QjgGpdcFV4BxKUGAhfTTvDAO8Z1hnstzlD9PWyWeUtxAvM2Ov33URkxF_ZTRpOfE_uUxbjZMgrO_g1W7n7dqwub5Psh2dnIhkI4UIJQBMec6AY_XaUDOzzVomAVJhhzSR59ZPJJdVezro9hFOWLAEzBvWG9Utr13PVU1Zt1pArN0SLI5L4Hq8J1L992Fz_xZ9zJG15ivvA6IA8JqArxzdfe_JKvLI_R23Mj831h0chG_dPnjZINz2dfW-B3W3NDUiGcnK4MuEIMcqTK_Dx91otFuY_VjVt_LHZbuBE1FmWZV2JADKYrmKH4VpWCzr59XmydBNb5b7BQeF0ZlfxyRuDNwgbQgq0hi5hvYh7aS8ca2mclPCx1JnbHkNjSnN8F9a8He6mSSJxtWFaJwB_mXaz4hC2FBzsPU4ulE4rtYGeAug3B9jeBYYv9Egot9ICxLXFotXEJaIkboy8PyPjraEt1RR9L2HpUZhdF-DC582V8lZERKFzM8bWRt9Jllw%3D)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Why my opponent hates cops more than Nancy Pelosi:
body:
My opponent Rep. Lois Frankel is the biggest cop hater in Congress.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-397944-936936-5248576-3bb1634d02-63c35a6b01)
[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-397944-936936-5248577-4809aafde3-63c35a6b01) Patriot,

My opponent Rep. Lois Frankel is the biggest cop hater in Congress.

In fact, she hates cops even more than Nancy Pelosi.

For years, Lois has _gone out of her way_ to endanger our kids and our communities... just to score points with her left-wing base.

[**Will you help me defeat her once and for all on Election Day, by pitching in $10 or more?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-397944-936936-5248576-3bb1634d02-63c35a6b01)

[**Pitch in $10, $25, or even $50 right away.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-397944-936936-5248577-4809aafde3-63c35a6b01)

Lois has a long history of anti-cop activism... _thanking_ violent rioters in Florida and cheering on Antifa.

The craziest? Her opposition to the **Protect and Serve Act** \-- a law that would punish cop killers.

If you’re thinking, “Gee, Laura, what kind of radical leftist monster could be against something like _that_?” you’re absolutely right... hardly anyone was:

In fact, this bill was so popular that **92% of Congress--_a massive bipartisan majority_ \--voted _for_ this law**, including Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff.

**But not Lois Frankel** ... who voted against Republicans, against Democrats, and against our communities... so she could support chaos, violence, and left-wing riots.

I _cannot wait_ to defeat Lois on Election Day... but first, I need your help.

[**Will you support my campaign with a donation of $10 or more?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-397944-936936-5248576-3bb1634d02-63c35a6b01)

[**Pitch in $10, $25, or even $50 now so I can defeat Lois Frankel and make it to Washington.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-397944-936936-5248577-4809aafde3-63c35a6b01)

Thanks for your help!

Laura Loomer

name: Gary Peters
subject: really can't afford to fall short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Democrats have ZERO chance of taking back the Senate if we lose in Michigan. And now, a new poll from the New York Times shows me just ONE POINT ahead of my Trump-backed opponent.
Hi there: Despite unprecedented support for our campaign in Michigan, my opponent has outraised us four out of the last five quarters. This is all thanks to Donald Trump funneling MILLIONS into Michigan to defeat me and buy this seat to expand Mitch McConnell's majority in the Senate.
**They know that Democrats have ZERO chance of taking back the Senate if we lose in Michigan. And now, a new poll from the New York Times shows me just ONE POINT ahead of my Trump-backed opponent.**
Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports that Democrats can take back the Senate, but we must first win in Michigan. That's why we set a goal of raising $20,000 TODAY -- and with Michiganders already casting their ballots by the thousands, we can't afford to fall short.
Look, in a race this close, whether or not we hit this goal could determine Senate control, so we're counting on your immediate contribution:

Hi there: Despite unprecedented support for our campaign in Michigan, my opponent has outraised us four out of the last five quarters. This is all thanks to Donald Trump funneling MILLIONS into Michigan to defeat me and buy this seat to expand Mitch McConnell's majority in the Senate. They know that Democrats have ZERO chance of taking back the Senate if we lose in Michigan. And now, a new poll from the New York Times shows me just ONE POINT ahead of my Trump-backed opponent. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports that Democrats can take back the Senate, but we must first win in Michigan. That's why we set a goal of raising $20,000 TODAY -- and with Michiganders already casting their ballots by the thousands, we can't afford to fall short. Look, in a race this close, whether or not we hit this goal could determine Senate control, so we're counting on your immediate contribution: "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Maggie Hassan and Gary Peters. "" "" "" "" Thank you so much, Gary "" _

name: Nancy Mace
subject: some good news, and what comes next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |
body:
I am one of the only GOP challengers in the entire country to outraise my incumbent opponent over the final stretch of the race. In fact, in the last [ ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=18b89e9b0dae42d8b7909865feb7fc57&_e=qAu_r9Qi2e7vEEqhdQw8IbtVEZXjuuiyNcEdf5jPQFddDreCBntHHMUYXTubYE_Ow94SNVGYMkg_8CS6rowHwX619T4DZWSw-dY-zfUzLPZKvr81H3kGBs91gYONuLpeRCUttGzGyuRp5tQtaBZhC14sE70yjfxaQUBndtP2GOKOgLFCbMpGsbdRcGk4lO-DHwqOluk_RrqXtIFEVkq8ZcNaEAGfMmHop74950QIXibsK5EPD2tmwjWnQDvTo4YabvPqvoKZX9Xx-xthIUzan2bhdhVp2bYp1lfxJN4Y2dtU_f3kXzHXCTzwRBEMDKSXSZpgJSQgpud5TUXAQ7DSgu9E3kC3wvjQH-Zb4GwZzkv8YL86jqz4QAoHfjHGvr37ztMnVMrJnXkF5xKtG8u6YRMNgEORWwTnM-88G7yrNM6FIAWbAoywZ5VICbkAfgkzF8UP9qMVIO6T0uCJISfYEINKvEOzq2Tp76IvfLT-xdQ%3D) Friend, Lowcountry voters are ready for a change.
I hear it every single day on the campaign trail — people in our district are tired of Democrat Joe Cunningham’s partisan, Lowcountry-last leadership style. They want to send a fiscal conservative, Lowcountry-first leader to Congress and they are more excited about our campaign than ever before.
And you don’t have to take my word for it — the proof is in the pudding.
I am one of the only GOP challengers in the entire country to outraise my incumbent opponent over the final stretch of the race. In fact, in the last three months, we’ve raised more than half of our total for our entire campaign. [ ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=18b89e9b0dae42d8b7909865feb7fc57&_e=qAu_r9Qi2e7vEEqhdQw8IQ6Gw-buxtBOsWl02b2IsZ5KqNbHD1gtKMOA99H1bHSSZ3NJ4GUQ6lCM7U4icgrFqDAxKD3TbtMlT8pnJeaNpgFBNP104rSDgMZ7f-6oM1r5lnKKbCnpS9OyTyYHn1lSg_GNhPZ0zrYRKu3C6MtstkN95MbQLCO1OXy90vB3fn_oYzBOwSvl-ZmKE7QcoWac9dkjPf4majt7rDjduvkgtEzi_U0UZ7X4wDFM4mj2SXT3WkJxanhdtPdNoNRRW_MNn9A-EvgZIv1IEV4hp-lB7jcUBY7wPg1A3uX4n3qTU2aUW1PPAfPhX8XASoT_4DeNw8u4zbma6SRxQjAfB1xLsWicZ7U8h40CsaDNUpuHDpTjIapjpx-3fK-xD5aQuTbhVzPt3WcvrmmbbjfNzp5eCvjdNbeesyBKWvVWkzMzjNoK3Au5cKL93j8QtCC2HTIdfe8kfJUPcdf_LTcs30Ul6SMgsv8o8hJ4xRU4q-n3xFNOlptYXG3pD8uNnSWAOngBOQ%3D%3D) That’s called momentum, Friend. It’s the first time we’ve had a fundraising advantage on Democrat Joe Cunningham and it’s coming at just the right time and in just the right place.
The State just said that this race — SC-01 — “could determine whether Democrats keep their majority in the U.S. House of Representatives, or whether Republicans net the 18 seats they need to regain control of the chamber.”
That’s why these last couple of weeks are so important. And even though we have a lead in cash on hand, we need to work even harder from here on out.
The money we raise will go to getting crucial television ads in front of Lowcountry voters and powering a ground game that will help us win at the ballot box on November 3rd.
We need to keep up our advantage and push harder than ever in this final sprint to Election Day.
That’s why I’m reaching out right now. Friend, will you help me keep this crucial advantage in the final weeks by donating any amount below? We’re counting on you to keep this momentum going. Donate here:**[https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/action-1628145/dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=18b89e9b0dae42d8b7909865feb7fc57&_e=qAu_r9Qi2e7vEEqhdQw8IbtVEZXjuuiyNcEdf5jPQFddDreCBntHHMUYXTubYE_Ow94SNVGYMkg_8CS6rowHwX619T4DZWSw-dY-zfUzLPZKvr81H3kGBs91gYONuLpeRCUttGzGyuRp5tQtaBZhC14sE70yjfxaQUBndtP2GOKOgLFCbMpGsbdRcGk4lO-DHwqOluk_RrqXtIFEVkq8ZcNaEAGfMmHop74950QIXibsK5EPD2tmwjWnQDvTo4YabvPqvoKZX9Xx-xthIUzan52ktwSpSow6CyIjttddqypu7TOimGWqNSM8_4CiAUbUi_u6AZgw8NJ0AZo_n0BaCv5AT6R5VWrfbGYX5FXnnM7m1oUmxh_qhe3WK2mT5Wkk23EVnSWjTXOtNSWa5NfX4lVqbK-tSLsLctD2oMBBhjXFaCSs4g54TcFJk3r016lFkZppk3MniqEdvPkhL3cMPuN8dHEsNoBj5QHZqQMzkbE%3D)**
Thank you for everything that you do,
Nancy Mace |

name: Jessica Morse
subject: Help me get Grit Back in Congress
body:
| | | |
---
Friends,
For our nation to truly heal, we have to elect leaders who are grounded on principle up and down the ticket. That's why I’m asking you to support my wonderful friend Audrey Denney, who is running for Congress in California’s 1st District against Trump-loyalist Doug LaMalfa.
Audrey and I ran together in 2018, excited to be the Sierra women in Congress. While I didn’t win, Audrey swung her red district 10 points and is poised to finish the job on November 3rd. Her latest poll shows a statistical tie.
[I’m supporting Audrey Denney -- will you? Chip in now! ](https://u16460731.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=rf6U8ijtGmaHDE08oAvVWv9ezuEP09FXPKWFkgnESpxwNc1Luq2PUwy7b8zBkhL2APYtGGGZbGl25Z9bJQUW7A-3D-3DRrsN_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6-2FrFokE-2FR6nsNgkBrq7S9usNo6xcQxTeIi7t-2BWXifdy-2FMeqWFF8g5dC7CIERPqnSDV9S2O067yHU2z-2FWXKaYgo2iq8aYXOgsRik6rvagBbO0oS0sFaBHs3zLBNWho6EHOsCn64wDm8t1x9z-2Fs-2By8gKaA8uKML0lWSqZ6ioKI-2ByGgZtbriYZKNtieG-2FAZCnERbEihuWYcCvKo4a8HMIGeovl6dWiCBetLsBy47SYCNWguodIkqJefIS549kas-2BEkCyCTgT-2Ft1N6WpkH-2BfRY1Oy5qMqc-2FK-2FhPs-2FJ3jWm5wVULAPBcM1KkX4diQU5NE2-2FpSm91K9th5BsTBeF-2Fy-2BOKhm4-2BJokaUxG7WiJov9Iw6hM8LQ9URu4WAS5-2FM6XiGFIgW7XvEABMsmF1bg5B0t2bzOpuYXcBkTIDVu1O9-2B2Lgp-2BnMo3t1-2FLVM7gukky8temLosimt8soDdUEIhpRO5aqlqQ1xB4kcSNykSXXA3JLql-2F0vOlP4o0SbQ26YkhbxRJo2yK9SXo6Llo9W4N6eoUJnUoNk8fMjF4EiiZfqbGNQbblOKxYZCgSJ21mGg78IAO69ulBLX9ulWQ2dhCfGbcd3qYdCPavlvzSa4Bp8VQp1u0-2BXXNksfswUAzTSTiJH44DW4z4AcIB0DSue-2FrQYJ1u2-2FxJfFy58j-2FFqRcXi65SnrH-2B0NfbHBbpDp1LPmyZEUPBcXZr31GXhroEQNUevVPomfFq4vKahkp8mlIizUQahV0ns-3D)
Also, meet me and Audrey TODAY at NOON (PT) for a virtual rally and phone bank! I’ll give a little talk and then we’ll call voters. [Sign up here!](https://u16460731.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=rf6U8ijtGmaHDE08oAvVWvGEB0RL-2FWje35-2FBQqcz7p7UvipPrWslGcNo5DjhxXS-2BlUzplNnu4Ul1d955xVYfOKxbWJwjqEcZtCmhA-2F-2BLh3E-3DMSB5_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6-2FrFokE-2FR6nsNgkBrq7S9usNo6xcQxTeIi7t-2BWXifdy-2FMeqWFF8g5dC7CIERPqnSDV9S2O067yHU2z-2FWXKaYgo2iq8aYXOgsRik6rvagBbO0oS0sFaBHs3zLBNWho6EHOsCn64wDm8t1x9z-2Fs-2By8gKaA8uKML0lWSqZ6ioKI-2ByGgZtbriYZKNtieG-2FAZCnERbEihuWYcCvKo4a8HMIGeovl6dWiCBetLsBy47SYCNWguodIkqJefIS549kas-2BEkCyCTgT-2Ft1N6WpkH-2BfRY1Oy5qMqc-2FK-2FhPs-2FJ3jWm5wVULAPBcM1KkX4diQU5NE2-2FpSm91K9th5BsTBeF-2Fy-2BOKhm4-2BJokaUxG7WiJov9Iw6hM8LQ9URu4WAS5-2FM6XiGFIgW7XvEABMsmF1bg5B0t2bzOpuYXcBkTIDVu1O9-2B2Lgp-2BnMo3t1-2FLVM7gukky8temLosimt8soDdUEIhpRO5aqlqQ1xB4kcSNykSXXA3JLql-2F0vOlP4o0SbQ26YkhbxRJo2yK9SXo6Llo9W4N6eoUJnUoNk8fMjF4EiiZfqbGNQbblOKxYZCgSJ21mGg78IAO69ulBLX9ulWQ2dhCfGbcd3qYe3pOczmLIvRAD-2BjB4q3gNeDlhRTDmHZhW4TNBLnmklWyg21GqE16mFTmox-2FbQ8mq3g2rdGacC4AzTMlOqDvnGPksrxWAEzwNBxKLlMpP17kXR3NO9-2BKuIRqo7WcZOGsJNj4vagwEoqlXNfBC62o-2BGA-3D)
Northern California is a mix of Agriculture and mountains and Audrey speaks ‘farmer’ fluently. She spent her career in sustainable agriculture, teaching and consulting. In our new climate future, Congress will need Audrey’s understanding to steer the agrarian economy through climate change and enable agriculture to be a tool to reduce rather than drive greenhouse gas emissions.
[Let’s get a scientist-farmer to Congress! Chip in now! ](https://u16460731.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=rf6U8ijtGmaHDE08oAvVWv9ezuEP09FXPKWFkgnESpxwNc1Luq2PUwy7b8zBkhL2APYtGGGZbGl25Z9bJQUW7A-3D-3D_U5D_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6-2FrFokE-2FR6nsNgkBrq7S9usNo6xcQxTeIi7t-2BWXifdy-2FMeqWFF8g5dC7CIERPqnSDV9S2O067yHU2z-2FWXKaYgo2iq8aYXOgsRik6rvagBbO0oS0sFaBHs3zLBNWho6EHOsCn64wDm8t1x9z-2Fs-2By8gKaA8uKML0lWSqZ6ioKI-2ByGgZtbriYZKNtieG-2FAZCnERbEihuWYcCvKo4a8HMIGeovl6dWiCBetLsBy47SYCNWguodIkqJefIS549kas-2BEkCyCTgT-2Ft1N6WpkH-2BfRY1Oy5qMqc-2FK-2FhPs-2FJ3jWm5wVULAPBcM1KkX4diQU5NE2-2FpSm91K9th5BsTBeF-2Fy-2BOKhm4-2BJokaUxG7WiJov9Iw6hM8LQ9URu4WAS5-2FM6XiGFIgW7XvEABMsmF1bg5B0t2bzOpuYXcBkTIDVu1O9-2B2Lgp-2BnMo3t1-2FLVM7gukky8temLosimt8soDdUEIhpRO5aqlqQ1xB4kcSNykSXXA3JLql-2F0vOlP4o0SbQ26YkhbxRJo2yK9SXo6Llo9W4N6eoUJnUoNk8fMjF4EiiZfqbGNQbblOKxYZCgSJ21mGg78IAO69ulBLX9ulWQ2dhCfGbcd3qYbIad7Z35Aja5EWmy-2FDNKP4a-2Fuk-2FKDYsjx-2B0vPsd-2Fp3MK5RC0ySnQi40DIcVda6lSJIfdfJnoZQSvnWo-2B4NRRCHfianr57Hhrdwh1rB-2FZJhBgyB5VPOnlKyibGh1UT6klx5tCcP7cbepLGQDoNF4Ilg-3D)
It’s not going to be an easy Congress to walk into and Audrey has more grit than anyone I know. In 2018, Audrey pulled me aside after we had done an event together. She had been laughing and smiling and listening during the event, but now her eyes were filled with tears. She said, “Jess, I found out this morning that I have a football sized tumor in my abdomen.”
I hugged her for a long time and we talked. I asked what she was going to do, expecting her to say she needed to drop out of the race. “Well, I’m going to find a doctor that can pull this out and then get back on trail.” I looked at her shocked, “You’re going to keep running?” She laughed and said, “Jess, our country needs me. I can’t let a tumor stop me.”
And she didn't let it slow her down for even a beat.
They removed the tumor and Audrey used her surgery to highlight the state of rural health care in this country. Seriously, [she made a campaign video from post-op](https://u16460731.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=rf6U8ijtGmaHDE08oAvVWrmFRnGGrKzXxtDdwJk1WGoSY5kaacdQxTeLH1R-2BewyInLmTRB3N0v2tn8xr5EZH0zppt7CXqu2mt19rYMTZPYA-3DYa6w_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6-2FrFokE-2FR6nsNgkBrq7S9usNo6xcQxTeIi7t-2BWXifdy-2FMeqWFF8g5dC7CIERPqnSDV9S2O067yHU2z-2FWXKaYgo2iq8aYXOgsRik6rvagBbO0oS0sFaBHs3zLBNWho6EHOsCn64wDm8t1x9z-2Fs-2By8gKaA8uKML0lWSqZ6ioKI-2ByGgZtbriYZKNtieG-2FAZCnERbEihuWYcCvKo4a8HMIGeovl6dWiCBetLsBy47SYCNWguodIkqJefIS549kas-2BEkCyCTgT-2Ft1N6WpkH-2BfRY1Oy5qMqc-2FK-2FhPs-2FJ3jWm5wVULAPBcM1KkX4diQU5NE2-2FpSm91K9th5BsTBeF-2Fy-2BOKhm4-2BJokaUxG7WiJov9Iw6hM8LQ9URu4WAS5-2FM6XiGFIgW7XvEABMsmF1bg5B0t2bzOpuYXcBkTIDVu1O9-2B2Lgp-2BnMo3t1-2FLVM7gukky8temLosimt8soDdUEIhpRO5aqlqQ1xB4kcSNykSXXA3JLql-2F0vOlP4o0SbQ26YkhbxRJo2yK9SXo6Llo9W4N6eoUJnUoNk8fMjF4EiiZfqbGNQbblOKxYZCgSJ21mGg78IAO69ulBLX9ulWQ2dhCfGbcd3qYdpaAxf7lgdqp0L5I0dpFp89eU4EiOE0e08HZ9DcRg-2BNKTtCfWHJduZfMciC8sfNqqgH17wCztVMNMsVL-2FQPCY4YHHSxfO1vCaSOCHpY9qQpA557CNGsFQYhobyor1TV47STOa4BT9sNVzSRo7h9dI8-3D)! That's grit!
The November election wont end the turmoil in our nation. We need someone with Audrey’s strength, grit, understanding and sincerity to help re-ground our nation on principle and character.

clean_body: | | | | Friends, For our nation to truly heal, we have to elect leaders who are grounded on principle up and down the ticket. That's why I’m asking you to support my wonderful friend Audrey Denney, who is running for Congress in California’s 1st District against Trump-loyalist Doug LaMalfa. Audrey and I ran together in 2018, excited to be the Sierra women in Congress. While I didn’t win, Audrey swung her red district 10 points and is poised to finish the job on November 3rd. Her latest poll shows a statistical tie. Also, meet me and Audrey TODAY at NOON (PT) for a virtual rally and phone bank! I’ll give a little talk and then we’ll call voters. Northern California is a mix of Agriculture and mountains and Audrey speaks ‘farmer’ fluently. She spent her career in sustainable agriculture, teaching and consulting. In our new climate future, Congress will need Audrey’s understanding to steer the agrarian economy through climate change and enable agriculture to be a tool to reduce rather than drive greenhouse gas emissions. It’s not going to be an easy Congress to walk into and Audrey has more grit than anyone I know. In 2018, Audrey pulled me aside after we had done an event together. She had been laughing and smiling and listening during the event, but now her eyes were filled with tears. She said, “Jess, I found out this morning that I have a football sized tumor in my abdomen.” I hugged her for a long time and we talked. I asked what she was going to do, expecting her to say she needed to drop out of the race. “Well, I’m going to find a doctor that can pull this out and then get back on trail.” I looked at her shocked, “You’re going to keep running?” She laughed and said, “Jess, our country needs me. I can’t let a tumor stop me.” And she didn't let it slow her down for even a beat. They removed the tumor and Audrey used her surgery to highlight the state of rural health care in this country. Seriously, ! That's grit! The November election wont end the turmoil in our nation. We need someone with Audrey’s strength, grit, understanding and sincerity to help re-ground our nation on principle and character. Join us TODAY at NOON (PT) to meet Audrey and hang out with me. I’ll give a pep talk and then we’ll make calls to flip the seat! . Audrey and I are both very fun, so you don’t want to miss this! Together we can make our nation whole again. In solidarity, Jess Jessica Morse 1079 Sunrise Ave , Suite B-275, Roseville , CA 95661

subject: An update from the trail
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | Friend,
---
| I have a quick update from the trail: just yesterday we added over 100 new contributors, and we want to keep that momentum going and add 100 more **today.**
---
| [Join in here!](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=d8c8176bd6&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Join in here!")
---
| We need to keep this energy up through the next couple of weeks so we can close the fundraising gap between us and our opponent and make sure our voice isn’t drowned out by the millions of dollars flooding into our race from California and New York. Help us out by clicking on the button below and chipping in anything you can - $1, $3, $5, or whatever you can spare – we’re counting on small donations from folks like you to help bring home a win, so every contribution matters!
---
| [Click here to chip in!](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=f5b2924b82&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Click here to chip in!")
---
| Thank you for your contributions, prayers, and encouragements – we wouldn’t have gotten this far without such incredible support from the people of the Fourth District, and it’s your continued backing that will help us deliver a win on November 3rd!
---
|
---
| | | PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
---
| Feenstra For Congress641 2nd StHull, IA 51239-7323

clean_body: | = | | Hi team — I’m reaching out to you all with a quick update. We’re about $9,873 away from our $50,000 TV ad goal and I’m hoping you’ll help us close the gap. TV ads are vital to connecting with TX-10 voters and getting them to the polls. We simply can’t come up short or go dark with only 17 days until Election Day. So, I have to ask:= | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = These last 17 days of this campaign will determine if we flip this district or come up short. I know what it’s like to come so close and lose. And we can’t come so close to let it happen again. Our TV ads are working — we’ve got the polls to prove it. But, now we just need to fully-fund them to maintain our momentum until every voter hits the ballot box. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Can’t win without y’all. Thanks a lot! Friend,
---
Because you’ve been a trusted member of our campaign, I wanted to share with you an internal poll we just conducted.
---
**_I am now tied - within the margin of error - with Democrat Lizzie Fletcher._**
---
**_...And 7% of voters are still undecided._**
---
With early voting already happening in Texas, we’re racing against the clock to take the lead.
---

clean_body: I’m sharing this with you because you got us to where we are today. | Friend, Because you’ve been a trusted member of our campaign, I wanted to share with you an internal poll we just conducted. I am now tied - within the margin of error - with Democrat Lizzie Fletcher. ...And 7% of voters are still undecided. With early voting already happening in Texas, we’re racing against the clock to take the lead. Because we’ve worked so hard to come this far, we need to make sure we do everything we can to surge ahead, so I’ve secured a 3X-MATCH for the next HOUR. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Captain, U.S. Army Aviation Branch Official Republican Nominee for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Our FINAL FEC Deadline Goal was our biggest fundraising push ever and American Patriots, like YOU, stepped up BIG TIME to help us CRUSH it. We’re now in the FINAL WEEKS OF THE ELECTION! Don’t wait to step up later this week, or tomorrow, or even later today....the time to step up is RIGHT NOW. This is your moment to re-elect President Trump! We’re going to WIN BIG in November for one simple reason:unlike the Radical Left and their Hollywood MEGA DONORS, we have the support of the American People, like YOU. With just weeks left to go until Election Day, it’s crucial to keep the momentum on our side, so my father has decided to do something HUGE for you: He’s extended your 800%-MATCH for the NEXT HOUR. My father is really counting on you to step up. I know you won’t let him down. My father has been fighting nonstop for you and he’s not done yet, Friend. I’m sending my father a list of every single Patriot who uses their 800%-MATCH in the NEXT HOUR. Will he see your name? name: =?utf-8?Q?Dr.=20Larry=20Sylvester?=
subject: This November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Larry Sylvester for School Board
body:
| | | | [ ](https://larrysylvester.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=92bf0220b7c9b43b02ebf051f&id=9ceb80a77a&e=a5c6b39366)
---
| | |
---
| This November, Mississippians will cast a ballot for President of the United States and stand up for what they believe. Down your ballot, you will also have the opportunity to hire your next School Board Member.
This position will have a significant impact on the trajectory of our future, and, among other things, carry a heavy influence over property values, taxes and economic attractiveness within our county. I want to be a part of ensuring we are moving the needle in the right direction on these issues.
That’s why I’m applying for the job - because I believe DeSoto County will only be as strong as our local school system.
It has been an honor to serve you in the classroom at Northwest Mississippi Community College, but this election is about our future. Now, I am asking to serve you once again – this time as a DeSoto County School Board Member.
It will be my mission as a Board Member to listen and learn – then lead – on issues that allow us to continue improving the academic excellence and outstanding extracurricular activities for which we have become known.

Unfortunately, this position is nonpartisan and doesn’t allow me to run as a Republican or Democrat. It doesn’t however prevent me from telling you what I am. I am an educator. A teacher of teachers, and our campaign is about localism and the classroom.
I’m fully committed to putting localism first so that we can continue our recipe of success and serving those who are tirelessly working to equip the workforce of tomorrow with the tools they need to be successful today – our teachers.

Bottom line, I have no political ambitions beyond wanting what’s “best” for my children and yours – which is reason enough for me.
I have the resume and I am here to apply for the job. I sincerely appreciate your vote and any support you are willing to give in helping me reach that goal on November 3rd.

Best personal regards,

Sincerely,

Dr. Larry Sylvester, Ph.D.

---
|
---

subject: I'd love to have your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Biden_President_Logo.png

Team,

Let me say this again: I'm beyond excited that Joe asked me to join this team, as his running mate.

I'm ready to get to work, win this election, rebuild our country, and serve you, the people.

But I didn't see your name on our list of grassroots endorsers and I'm really hoping you can take a moment to add your name before the convention begins. Can you add your endorsement now? (https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pet-endorse-the-ticket?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.16_B1_kdh-endorse_X__F1_S1_C1__reac-mc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.16_B1_kdh-endorse_X__F1_S1_C1__reac-mc)

YES, I'LL ENDORSE THE TICKET >> (https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pet-endorse-the-ticket?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.16_B1_kdh-endorse_X__F1_S1_C1__reac-mc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.16_B1_kdh-endorse_X__F1_S1_C1__reac-mc)

I'm thankful to be on this journey with you. Let's win this thing!

Your partner in the fight,

Kamala Harris

P.S. Endorsing our ticket is a great way to show that you believe in leaders who follow medical guidance, listen to the scientists, and yes, wear masks! Click here to add your endorsement now » (https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pet-endorse-the-ticket?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.16_B1_kdh-endorse_X__F1_S1_C1__reac-mc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.16_B1_kdh-endorse_X__F1_S1_C1__reac-mc)

I'm ready to get to work, win this election, rebuild our country, and serve you, the people. But I didn't see your name on our list of grassroots endorsers and I'm really hoping you can take a moment to add your name before the convention begins. Can you add your endorsement now? () YES, I'LL ENDORSE THE TICKET >> () I'm thankful to be on this journey with you. Let's win this thing! Your partner in the fight, Kamala Harris P.S. Endorsing our ticket is a great way to show that you believe in leaders who follow medical guidance, listen to the scientists, and yes, wear masks! Click here to add your endorsement now » () ============================================================ () () () ()

He just posted the highest number of any Senate campaign in U.S. history. | Peter, Right now, Democrats are beating us in the "fundraising game." "What's remarkable about the Democratic fundraising totals is that we still don't know how much former state party Chairman Jaime Harrison (D) raised in the third quarter for his increasingly competitive challenge to Sen. Lindsey Graham of South Carolina." Well, now we know, Peter. We've been outraised by my opponent's campaign throughout this year, and he's not just setting records here in South Carolina. He's posting the highest numbers in U.S. Senate campaign history: $57 million dollars in the Third Quarter alone! Here is what we're up against: a nationwide leftist funding effort and an "eye popping" war chest that is funding round-the-clock attacks against me on the internet, radio, TV, and more. Liberal media outlets, pundits, and pollsters are predicting a "dead heat" finish to this race. With less than 20 days to go before Election Day, Time is rapidly slipping away.
